title: salvia montana
intro: Salvia montana, also known as mountain sage, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sage family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Salvia montana have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory problems, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of Salvia montana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
